title: The Global Economy Dark Clouds On The Horizon
section_path: The Global Economy Dark Clouds On The Horizon
section_path_text: The Global Economy Dark Clouds On The Horizon
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
There is no shortage of headline-grabbing events at the moment, with many of the items having the potential of derailing the global economic recovery. The rapid change in sentiment has been quite a turn-around from the optimism of previous months when the pandemic and its effects were perceived to be in retreat. The energy crisis is by no means the only dark cloud on an otherwise blue sky.
